text: Financial performance demonstrates strong momentum heading into Q4 2025, with revenue reaching $113.896 billion representing 11.29% year-over-year growth. Profitability metrics remain robust with operating margin at 31.61%, net margin at 30.25%, and free cash flow margin at 21.56%. The company maintains a solid balance sheet with a current ratio of 2.01 and debt-to-equity ratio of 0.17, indicating strong financial flexibility. R&D intensity stands at 16.31% of revenue, reflecting continued investment in innovation capabilities.
